hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d['tool_input'].get('file_path') or d['tool_input'].get('pattern',''))"); if echo "$path" | grep -q 'ml/dataset'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"ml/dataset/ is gitignored audio data — not for Claude context"}'; exit 2; fi
